Select the inverse of the following statement:\nIf it rained this morning, then the train will be late.
answer: If it didn't rain this morning, then the train will not be late.
a: If it didn't rain this morning, then the train will not be late.
b: The train is not late despite the fact that it rained this morning.
c: If the train is not late, then it didn't rain this morning.
d: If the train is late, then it rained this morning.

text: Select the converse of the following statement:\nIf it rained this morning, then the train will be late.
answer: If the train is late, then it rained this morning.
a: If it didn't rain this morning, then the train will not be late.
b: The train is not late despite the fact that it rained this morning.
c: If the train is not late, then it didn't rain this morning.
d: If the train is late, then it rained this morning.
